notes: Reviewed all 69 events in order (56 SEC filings + 13 transcripts); 25 events (8-K Items 5.02/5.07/7.01/8.01 etc.) had no substantive content text and contributed no candidates.
All 17 fiscal.ai KPI labels rewritten to standard driver_names (growth/state words dropped per ontology); counts vs comparable-sales vs system-wide-sales kept as separate drivers per segment.

Skipped (5): 53rd-week calendar comparability effect (calendar artifact, name would need a number token); bare 'inflation' (covered by commodity_prices/labor_costs/interest_rates); Brexit risk-factor boilerplate (no causal update); 'higher digital fees' minor revenue line (vague); Google Cloud partnership (vendor label banned in names - folded into technology_investment).
Dedups: wage_inflation folded into labor_costs; promotional QSR environment folded into competitor_price_discounting; transaction-volume mentions folded into restaurant_traffic.
food_costs and labor_costs share one evidence sentence that names both independent cost variables (ontology R2: one tag per variable).
